paths.name: @supabase/supabase-js
paths.message: Direct Supabase SDK imports are forbidden when DATABASE_PROVIDER != 'supabase'. Use the db abstraction layer at lib/db instead.

paths.name: @supabase/auth-helpers-nextjs
paths.message: Supabase auth helpers are forbidden. Auth is platform-managed JWT. See lib/auth/.

paths.name: @supabase/auth-helpers-react
paths.message: Supabase auth helpers are forbidden. Auth is platform-managed JWT. See lib/auth/.

paths.name: @supabase/auth-helpers-shared
paths.message: Supabase auth helpers are forbidden. Auth is platform-managed JWT.

patterns.message: Supabase auth helper packages are forbidden. Auth is platform-managed JWT. See lib/auth/ for the correct auth abstraction.
